sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitmap (id UInt32, bm AggregateFunction(bitmapUnion, UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_bitmap VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([4, 5, 6]));
UPDATE test_bitmap SET bm = bitmapUnion(bm, bitmapBuild([7])) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bitmapMax(bm) AS max_set_bit FROM test_bitmap GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, bitmapMax(bm) AS max_value FROM test_bitmap HAVING max_value > 5;
